content:
hello i recently downloaded the game and i fell in love with the art style unfortunately it doesn’t look like theres many guides if any easily available and im having trouble with team building. i dont know what units synergize with each other T-T
i took a liking to the aequor faction and want to pull for vortice but what units would be good with her? (Preferably standard units for now / if any rerun chars are coming up that work well lmk! )
also are dupes needed or is just getting her sig weapon sufficient? 
thank you in advance!!
so I’m not really sure on how the gacha works. Is there a pity system or something? Or is it just based on luck? I really wanted Pickman but im not really sure about the odds and stuff.
thread_title: I need help understanding the gacha (for limited banners?
